title: Effective Instruments — Instrument Aura Mapping
description: Schema for config/effective_instruments/instrument_auras.json. Maps instrument ResourceLocation ids to aura configs.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Current: 1. Files with a newer version than the running mod supports are rejected.

^_.description: Keys starting with underscore are treated as comments and ignored by the loader.

^[a-z0-9_.-]+:[a-z0-9_/.-]+$.description: Instrument ResourceLocation key. Value is either a shorthand aura id string or a config object.

oneOf.description: Shorthand: sets both default and only-allowed aura to this id.

default.description: The aura id auto-selected when the instrument opens.

allowed.description: All aura ids shown in the selector. The default is always included automatically.
